Caption: Formation and collapse of bubbles in a steady state [17].
Steps during bubble cavitation; (a) collapsing of vapour bubbles; (b) and (c) intrinsic shock wave; (d) increase of temperature and light emission.
Phenomenology of acoustic cavitation. Ultrasonic irradiation, radical formation, shock waves, sonoluminescence, fluid jet, bubble jet, surface erosion, bubble nucleation and cracks.
